overall.description: A samurai warrior stands on a wooden temple balcony overlooking a stormy valley with autumn foliage and a distant fortress. Lightning strikes illuminate the dark clouds as wind blows through the character's cloak. Cinematic game engine footage from Ghost of Tsushima.

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands on a sheltered wooden temple balcony overlooking a vast stormy valley. Dark clouds gather overhead as wind rustles through the autumn foliage on the hills below. A distant fortress sits atop a mountain peak. Suddenly, lightning strikes in the distance, briefly illuminating the turbulent sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a continuous gaze from a sheltered temple balcony that shifts from a brooding stillness to a sudden, electric intensity. It begins with the samurai overlooking a vast, stormy valley where dark clouds gather and wind rustles through the autumn foliage on the hills below. As the camera lingers on the landscape, the focus extends toward a distant fortress perched atop a mountain peak. The scene then culminates in a sudden flash of lightning that strikes in the distance, briefly illuminating the turbulent sky and transforming the mood of the valley.
